details: The agent successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html and used the snapshot tool to retrieve the actual page content. The agent correctly reported the first sentence as 'Availing himself of the mild, summer-cool weather...' which matches exactly what the page snapshot shows. While the known facts mention 'Avast!' as the start, the actual page content retrieved by the agent begins with 'Availing himself...' — the agent accurately reported what was on the page rather than hallucinating. The navigation and content extraction were performed correctly.
